# Feature Request

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature could be implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Impact
Describe the impact this feature would have on:
- Performance
- User experience
- Existing features
- Development process

## Implementation Complexity
- [ ] Low (simple change, minimal testing required)
- [ ] Medium (moderate changes, requires testing)
- [ ] High (complex changes, extensive testing needed)
- [ ] Unknown

## Breaking Changes
Would this feature introduce any breaking changes?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure
